primary_function: Creating algorithmic art using p5.js with seeded randomness and interactive parameter exploration. Use this when users request creating art using code, generative art, algorithmic art, flow fields, or particle systems. Create original algorithmic art rather than copying existing artists' work to avoid copyright violations.
suggested_aec_gates: Verify output includes both .md philosophy file and p5.js implementation files
Confirm algorithmic philosophy emphasizes computational processes and emergent behavior
Ensure generated art is 90% algorithmic generation, 10% essential parameters
Validate philosophy repeatedly emphasizes expert craftsmanship and meticulous refinement
Confirm implementation uses appropriate generative techniques (noise, particles, fields, forces)
Verify philosophy is 4-6 substantial paragraphs as specified
Ensure conceptual seed is subtly embedded rather than literally announced
Confirm output avoids static images or templates in favor of living algorithms
